query: WITH RECURSIVE descendants(id, depth) AS ( SELECT b.id, 0 FROM blocks b WHERE b.parent_id = ?1 AND b.deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT b.id, d.depth + 1 FROM blocks b JOIN descendants d ON b.parent_id = d.id WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.depth < 100 ) UPDATE blocks SET page_id = ?2 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM descendants) AND block_type != 'page'
